phases.title: Filter access + flag-off refresh routing, audit-log reason pin
Rotation + facade + logout-all routing to typed parsers

followUps: Scoped/fast-gate commands in the plan and task brief use `./gradlew -p backend`, but no repo-root gradlew wrapper exists — only `backend/gradlew -p <abs backend>` runs. Phases 02/03 inherit the same command string. Correct the handed-down command (and reconcile CLAUDE.md rule 11, which assumes a root `./gradlew`) — unknowable from phase scope whether the root wrapper should exist or the doc is stale.
